layout_note: Typed attachment table, transposed spreadsheet layout: one transaction per column (4 columns), attribute labels down the left (EIF; SP, DC, JT; Security Name; Ticker; Transaction; Amount of Transaction A-L + Spouse/DC; Type of Transaction Purchase/Sale/Partial Sale/Exchange; Capital Gain Exceeded $200; Transaction Date). Selections are black-filled cells. The 'SP, DC, JT' row and the 'Transaction' row are continuous black bands across all four columns (no letters visible). The 'Purchase' row is also a continuous black band across all four columns - read as Purchase selected for all four transactions since the Amount fills differ per column. Footer group label: 'MS Areco'.
free_text: Note: Dependent Child reporting was not applicable last year
